title: `_ssl._test_decode_cert` with an invalid file segfaults
author: devdanzin
body:
It's possible to segfault PyPy by passing an invalid filename to `_ssl._test_decode_cert`:
```python
Python 3.10.14 (39dc8d3c85a7, Aug 27 2024, 14:32:27)
[PyPy 7.3.17 with GCC 10.2.1 20210130 (Red Hat 10.2.1-11)] on linux
Type "help", "copyright", "credits" or "license" for more information.
>>>> import _ssl
>>>> _ssl._test_decode_cert("/dev/null")
Segmentation fault
```

Found using fusil by @vstinner.
